programme.title: Country House Hunters: New Zealand
programme.desc: Jorge and Ilsa's search in Hawera focuses on discovering a dream home where the town's rich historical tapestry intertwines with the captivating beauty of its natural surroundings.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia: Back to Win
programme.desc: Contestants from previous seasons return to face a series of unique challenges judged by culinary experts and world-famous chefs.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: North Yorkshire beckons to an Essex couple who need Jonnie Irwin's help to find a home in this beautiful region; Jonnie also visits the popular seaside resort of Whitby on a mission to work out why we love fish and chips so much.

programme.title: MasterChef Canada
programme.desc: The home cooks compete in a trying Restaurant Takeover team challenge and then some have to prepare the judges' breakfasts to escape elimination.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Erin is conflicted by the weight of her authority in the sentencing of a man who is guilty of vehicular homicide; Danny and Baez pursue a rideshare rapist; Jamie and Eddie team up to aid a fellow officer when his partner is shot on the job.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Eddie and her partner, Officer Rachel Witten, are heralded for their bravery for stopping an active shooter, until a civilian comes forward to accuse them of faking the incident as part of a government conspiracy.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Next Level Chef
programme.desc: Each person grabs a box with a country's flag on it and is tasked to make the country's signature dish; one chef's dreams come to an end.

programme.title: Jamie's 30 Minute Meals
programme.desc: Jamie makes stuffed Cypriot chicken with pan-fried asparagus and vine tomatoes, cabbage salad and St. Clement's and vanilla ice cream float.

programme.title: Jamie's 30 Minute Meals
programme.desc: Jamie makes a British picnic including sausage rolls, mackerel pâté, asparagus, crunchy salad and Pimm's Eton mess.

programme.title: The Good Stuff With Mary Berg
programme.desc: From fashion to beauty to décor to restaurant quality eats, Mary and her experts reveal their favourite dupes; the cast of "Degrassi: Whatever It Takes.".

programme.title: Mary Makes It Easy
programme.desc: Mary gives a quick crash course in French cuisine.

programme.title: Spencer's BIG 30
programme.desc: Spencer creates a vegetarian meal in about 30 minutes.

programme.desc: The cooks are faced with a giant Mystery Box; the cooks take a chance on tropical flavours in the Elimination Challenge.

programme.desc: The contestants reach the Arctic Ocean for the first time, via Inuvik and Tuktoyaktuk.

programme.title: Mary Makes It Easy
programme.desc: Mary shows how versatile meal planning can be with four recipes.

programme.title: Spencer's BIG 30
programme.desc: Spencer makes a budget-friendly fish dinner.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Frank deals with a police captain who's losing his grip over his precinct; Danny faces backlash after a tough call he made in the field; Erin weighs the consequences of a dangerous criminal's release under new bail laws.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: After Danny witnesses a drive-by shooting, he butts heads with the detective assigned to the case; a childhood friend of Jamie's is convinced that she has single-handedly solved a cold case murder.

programme.title: The Good Stuff With Mary Berg
programme.desc: Mary Berg explores lifestyle trends, do-it-yourself projects, home renovations, recipes and more; featuring celebrity guests, influencers and everyday heroes.

programme.title: Jamie's 30 Minute Meals
programme.desc: Jamie cooks sardines on the grill and serves them with watercress salad, figs and crispy haloumi; dessert is a thick chocolate mousse.

programme.title: Jamie's 30 Minute Meals
programme.desc: Jamie prepares steak Indian-style, with spinach and paneer salad, naan breads, and a mango dessert.

programme.title: The Amazing Race Canada
programme.desc: The contestants reach the Arctic Ocean for the first time, via Inuvik and Tuktoyaktuk.

programme.title: Country House Hunters: New Zealand
programme.desc: Kim and John are on a hunt for a stunning home in New Plymouth, where the beauty of nature meets the vibrancy of city life, offering a perfect blend of relaxation and excitement.

programme.desc: Jorge and Ilsa's search in Hawera focuses on discovering a dream home where the town's rich historical tapestry intertwines with the captivating beauty of its natural surroundings.

programme.title: Thirst With Shay Mitchell
programme.desc: Shay Mitchell explores the world one drink at a time as she visits exotic locations, samples unique ingredients, and meets expert hosts; on her journey, she encounters the latest drink trends, the best bars, and 8,000 years of sipping history.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia: Back to Win
programme.desc: Renowned Malaysian chef Junda Khoo sets a challenging laksa taste test, where the chefs must guess the ingredients in his complex curry and use them to create their own dish.

programme.desc: Evelyn and Richard are on a quest in Nelson to find a home that inspires creativity, offering a peaceful retreat within a vibrant, artistically rich community.

programme.title: The Amazing Race Canada
programme.desc: Teams land in Prince George, B.C. where they see green before making a splash. Plus, the Double Blind Pass returns.

programme.title: Mary Makes It Easy
programme.desc: Leftovers can seem uninspiring, but Mary gives them new life by showing how to use them as ingredients in brand new recipes.

programme.title: Spencer's BIG 30
programme.desc: Spencer creates a taco night fiesta.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Erin tries not to feel overpowered as her new boss shadows her at work just as she's trying to get a nervous eyewitness to reveal the identity of who shot her boyfriend; Jaime arrests an intrusive reporter who appears at a series of store lootings.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Baez confides in Danny and asks for his help in proving her innocence after she finds a corpse in her front yard; Erin struggles to find a peaceful solution when she receives harsh case notes from her boss.

programme.title: Pets & Pickers
programme.desc: Dr. Ward removes a blind cat's eyes in order to give it a pain-free life; a dwarf kitten battling an unusual dental condition, sees Dr. Schwartz enlist the expertise of Dr. Vasilescu; three playful sugar gliders make for a chaotic exam.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia: Back to Win
programme.desc: Contestants take their cue from a gooey mystery box lift and incorporate goo into a dessert.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: A couple are leaving Spain for good and want to settle in Shropshire or Herefordshire.
